TokenMeter v0.2.1 fixes menu refreshes that could leave displayed usage data stale after the settings submenu had been attached to an earlier menu instance.

## Fixes

- Move the reusable settings submenu from the previous parent menu before rebuilding the status menu.
- Prevent AppKit submenu ownership conflicts from interrupting data-driven menu refreshes.
- Add regression coverage for repeated parent-menu creation.

## Requirements

- macOS 13 Ventura or later.
- `TokenMeter-v0.2.1-macos-universal.zip` contains `arm64` and `x86_64` slices.
- Use `SHA256SUMS` to verify the downloaded archive.

## Signing and Gatekeeper

This release is not signed with an Apple Developer ID and is not notarized by Apple. Gatekeeper may block the first launch. Control-click `TokenMeter.app` in Finder, choose **Open**, and confirm **Open**. Do not disable Gatekeeper globally.

## Privacy

TokenMeter scans supported logs and SQLite databases locally and read-only. It does not upload token usage, prompts, logs, or derived cost data.
